---
title: "Page Not Found"
---

# 🌐 Oops! Page 404

You've landed on a corner of `mlsysbook.ai` that doesn't exist.

This might be:

- An old link from before we split into two volumes,
- A direct link to a subsite that hasn't been published yet, or
- A typo in the URL.

## 🧭 Start here

- [🏠 mlsysbook.ai](/) — the unified landing page
- [📖 Volume I: Foundations](/vol1/)
- [📖 Volume II: At Scale](/vol2/)
- [🔥 TinyTorch](/tinytorch/) · [🔮 Labs](/labs/) · [📦 Hardware Kits](/kits/) · [🧮 MLSys·im](/mlsysim/)
- [🎞️ Slides](/slides/) · [🎓 Instructor Hub](/instructors/) · [🎯 StaffML](/staffml/)

## 🔍 Search

Use the navbar search to find content across the entire ecosystem.

## 🐛 Still lost?

- [📝 Report a broken link](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/issues/new)
- [💬 Ask the community](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions)

---

*"Every system has a 404 page. Welcome to ours."* 🪐
